notes: This sample was refreshed from a newer LES ammonia-flame paper because the repeated validation-panel structure is closer to the group's simulation workflow than the previous source.
The rendered version keeps only the compact temperature-profile row so the sample stays a lighter 1x3 starter rather than becoming another dense grid.

curation.why: Useful when a figure needs a compact 1x3 rhythm of repeated validation panels without promoting a full dense-grid layout.
